'''Rava Teb'lya''' was the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] owner of the [[Rose Nebula]] massage parlor, located on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. She used her Bothan spying skills and experience in extravagance to glean information from her influential clients and sold it to the highest bidder.

Teb'lya hired the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]], [[Tsserk]], as a bouncer for the parlor. He impressed her so much that she made him her personal bodyguard.
